title: オグリの大食い選手権

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
An eating contest is being held at the academy. I
spot Oguri Cap among the contestants.
choice_data_list:
Hold on, Oguri! You're going to gain weight
again!

Hold on, Oguri! You're going to gain weight
again!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Don't get in my way! Now's not the time! I have to win this contest.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
The winner gets a coupon for a supersize bowl of
ramen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She has her mind set on this. There's only thing I
can say...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She has her mind set on this. There's only thing I
can say...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Thanks. You just sit right back and watch.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna do whatever it takes to win that
supersize ramen coupon!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She speaks with bold, unwavering conviction.
Seeing her like this reminds me of when she's
racing.

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text: Oguri Cap wins! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yes, I did it! The prize is mine!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Oguri Cap's smile is even brighter than usual.

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
Would you believe it? We have two
winners—Oguri Cap and Special Week!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Argh, I tied with Special Week. I hope we both
still get the prize...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap seems a little frustrated, but before I
can console her, I need to come up with some
healthy meal options to offset this major
disruption to her usual diet.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: But this is an eating contest. You have to overdo it if you want a chance at winning.
choice_data_list:
I can buy you some ramen if you want it that
badly.

I can buy you some ramen if you want it that
badly.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Fine... I'll do what I can.

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text: And the winner is Special Week! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I lost... But I guess it doesn't matter. You're
treating me to some ramen anyway, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap fixes me with a resolute stare. I make a
mental note to find a place that serves healthy
ramen.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Mm... You mean I shouldn't leave even a spot of
sauce behind?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Now that you mention it, I'm sure that would
please the people who made the food too. I'll do
my best.

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
For the next round, our contestants have to
devour a pile of fried chicken the size of Mount
Fuji! I expect that even the most confident
gluttons will be calling it quits!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: It's no good! I can't fit in even one more bite!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Don't worry. I'll finish it for you.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: What? B-but why?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Phew... Not a crumb left. What a meal!

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
We have a winner! Oguri Cap—who, for some
reason, even volunteered to eat another
competitor's food! She's on a whole other level!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Completely unrivaled, Oguri Cap has redefined
what it means to win an eating contest... at the
cost of a substantial caloric intake.
